title: Frontend: Answer Persistence, Submission, and Role-Based UI
description: Implement the form answer persistence, submission workflow, and role-specific UI modes in the frontend. This builds on the navigation component (TASK-23). Includes: Immediate save of each question response to backend upon answer completion (API integration), Automatic retry with exponential backoff for failed save requests, Network error display with clear user instructions, Save-and-resume: close and reopen form response group, continue from first unanswered question, Submission confirmation dialog with answer review prompt, Warning about post-submission immutability, End-of-form uncompleted sections indicators with navigation links, Review mode rendering (read-only, no modifications), On-behalf-of filling UI (HCP selecting patient), and Preview mode in admin form editor. Implements REQ-20 (Immediate Answer Synchronization), part of REQ-22 (Submission UI), and part of REQ-21 (Review mode rendering, delegation UI). Mitigates RISK-4 (RMITIG-4: Immediate Response Persistence with Retry and Error Handling).

changeHistory.comment: Reverted to Draft — only TASK-20 should be in review
